directoryBenefits.description: Paid listings get a highlighted border in category pages — increasing click-through rates significantly compared to standard listings.

directoryBenefits.description: Your listing includes a quality dofollow link from The Web App Pro to your website — a direct authority signal for search engines.

directoryBenefits.description: Unlike time-limited promotions, your product stays permanently listed and continues attracting organic discovery indefinitely.

reviewBenefits.title: TWAP Certified badge you can embed on your site
reviewBenefits.description: Verified third-party social proof that increases conversion rates when placed on your landing page or app store listing.

reviewBenefits.title: Structured rating across UX, performance, and features
reviewBenefits.description: Scored out of 5 stars across four dimensions — giving users a fast, trustworthy signal before they click through to your product.

reviewBenefits.title: Evergreen SEO content that keeps driving traffic
reviewBenefits.description: Review articles rank in search engines for your product name and category keywords — bringing in organic traffic for years after publication.

web-mobile-apps.eyebrow: What happens when you list with us
web-mobile-apps.introText: No vague promises. Here's a concrete breakdown of what getting listed on The Web App Pro actually delivers for your mobile or web app.
web-mobile-apps.firstCardTitle: Listed in Our App Directory — Permanently
web-mobile-apps.firstCardDescription: Your app appears in our searchable, categorised directory the moment it's approved. Discoverable by users actively looking for apps like yours.
web-mobile-apps.secondCardTitle: A Real Expert Review — Not Just a Listing
web-mobile-apps.secondCardDescription: Our editorial team writes a thorough, unbiased review covering UX, functionality, pricing, and platform support. Fact-checked before publishing.

slides.quote: Our goal was to get into the top 10 finance apps — and The Web App Pro's Growth Blast plan got us there within 3 months. The combination of editorial review and newsletter reach created a trust signal we couldn't buy elsewhere.

metrics.label: Downloads in the first month post-feature

metrics.label: Better conversion than paid social channels

slides.quote: The founder interview feature gave our story real depth. Users arrived already knowing what we were about — the quality of our sign-ups improved dramatically. This is founder visibility done right.

metrics.label: Faster onboarding — users pre-educated on value

slides.quote: The founder interview transformed how people perceived us — we went from 'another AI writing tool' to the team behind a vision. The editorial depth of TWAP's review drove trust we couldn't manufacture ourselves.

items.question: How does TWAP select which apps to review?
items.answer: Every submission is reviewed personally by our editorial team. We evaluate UX, functionality, market fit, and value. For paid plans, your app is guaranteed to be reviewed and published within the agreed timeframe - typically 48-72 hours for Growth Blast and Full Visibility plans.

items.question: Do I need an App Store listing to be featured?
items.answer: No - web apps, SaaS products, and browser extensions are all welcome. An App Store link is optional and only needed if you want us to reference it in your review.

items.question: Is there a free option to get listed?
items.answer: Yes. Our Free Listing tier gives your app a permanent directory listing with a product profile page at no cost. No credit card required - simply submit and we'll review within 3-5 business days.

items.question: Are TWAP reviews editorially independent?
items.answer: Absolutely. Our editorial standards are strict - no advertiser influences our ratings or verdicts. If we identify weaknesses in your app, we'll mention them honestly. This independence is what makes our reviews valuable as social proof.

items.question: What does "personalised app store guidance" mean on Full Visibility?
items.answer: This refers to our team reviewing your App Store or Play Store listing copy, screenshots, and keyword strategy and providing written recommendations. For a full ASO engagement, please get in touch with our team directly - we can scope a dedicated programme.

items.question: Can I upgrade my plan after submitting?
items.answer: Yes. You can upgrade at any point or add individual add-ons to your existing plan. Contact our team and we'll pro-rate the difference and integrate the additional services.

items.question: How do I receive the TWAP Certified badge?
items.answer: Once your review is published (Launch Ready plan and above), we send you an embeddable HTML badge you can add to your website, app landing page, or marketing materials.

items.question: How do you evaluate AI tools - what criteria do you use?
items.answer: We test AI tools across four dimensions: capability (does it do what it claims?), output quality (is the output genuinely useful?), pricing fairness (does the value justify the cost?), and data privacy (how is user data handled?). Our AI-experienced editors use the tool in real workflows before writing any review.

items.question: My AI tool is still in beta - can I still be listed?
items.answer: Yes. We regularly feature early-stage and beta AI tools, particularly on our Free Discovery and AI Launch plans. Being listed early helps you build an audience before your full launch. We'll note the beta status in the review transparently.

items.question: Do you cover open-source AI tools?
items.answer: Absolutely. Open-source tools are welcome across all plans. We include GitHub links, deployment instructions, and use-case context in open-source reviews.

items.question: What's the difference between a listing and a review?
items.answer: A listing is a directory entry - your tool's name, description, category, and link. A review is a 600-1,200 word editorial article written by our team after actually using your tool. Reviews include star ratings, pros/cons, a verdict, and the embeddable AI Certified badge. Reviews are included in AI Launch plan and above.

items.question: How do I get into the "Best AI Tools" comparison articles?
items.answer: Inclusion in comparison and ranking articles begins with the AI Authority plan ($149). Our editors then evaluate whether your tool fits relevant comparison pieces based on category and capability. We don't guarantee placement in every comparison article - only ones where your tool is genuinely a strong fit.

items.question: Do you cover AI APIs and developer tools - not just end-user products?
items.answer: Yes. We have a specific category for AI APIs, developer tools, and infrastructure products. Our editorial team includes technically literate editors who understand developer audiences and write accordingly.

items.question: What does "Dedicated Quora AI Strategy" in the AI Domination plan mean?
items.answer: Our team identifies the most-viewed Quora questions in your AI tool's category and writes or contributes answers that reference your tool authentically. This targets high-intent users who are actively researching solutions - directing them to your listing.

items.question: What types of agencies and service providers do you accept?
items.answer: We welcome development studios, design agencies, AI consultancies, digital marketing firms, branding agencies, and any specialised tech service provider. We cover both boutique specialists and full-service agencies.

items.question: Is there a minimum team size or revenue threshold?
items.answer: No. We feature agencies of all sizes - from solo consultants to 200+ person studios. What matters is the quality and specificity of your offer, not your headcount.

items.question: How is an agency showcase different from a paid advertisement?
items.answer: Our showcase articles are written editorially - our team researches your agency, reviews your portfolio, and writes an honest assessment of your strengths and specialisations. It's closer to a Clutch review or a magazine profile than an ad.

items.question: Can you help us get found by clients looking for specific services?
items.answer: Yes. Your agency profile is tagged with your specialisations (e.g. "AI Agent Development", "React Native", "Fintech Design") so clients searching for specific capability can find you in our directory.

items.question: What does "Dedicated Quora Strategy" involve?
items.answer: Our team identifies high-traffic Quora questions in your agency's niche (e.g. "How do I find a good AI development agency?") and contributes authentic answers that reference your agency's relevant work. This targets decision-makers in active research mode.

items.question: Do you publish client case studies from our existing client work?
items.answer: Yes - the Agency Authority and Market Leader plans include published case study articles. You provide the client story and results; our editorial team shapes it into a compelling article on our platform.

items.question: We want a full ASO or technical SEO audit for our clients - do you offer that?
items.answer: For comprehensive technical SEO or app store optimisation for your clients, please get in touch with our team directly. We can discuss a tailored consultancy engagement.
